## Validation

- [ ] `python tasks.py check` passes (lint, typecheck, scan, tests)
- [ ] If a script or sample input changed: `python tasks.py run` was rerun and the
      regenerated outputs are committed
- [ ] All data is fictional, synthetic, anonymized, or approved
- [ ] Committed files are ASCII only and every new reference resolves
